reviews.comment:

A quiet place to rest for a while after your trip and have a coffee. Clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, muy buena atención. Siempre es para nosotros un  verdadero placer poder poder hacer un alto en el viaje es una tradición para nosotros. Excelente!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, very good service. It's always a real pleasure for us to be able to stop here on our trip; it's a tradition for us. Excellent!
